ModMetaData.name: RJW ChineseTraditional
ModMetaData.author: xzihnago, Alane
ModMetaData.description:
RJW 與部分附加模組的中文化，包含以下模組
• RimJobWorld [47702a] (部分) • RimJobWorld - Cum [21af8a] (完整) • RimJobWorld - FB [9080ca] (完整) • RimJobWorld - FC [dca868] (完整) • RimJobWorld - FH [be266b] (完整) • RimJobWorld - STD [70525e] (完整)
• RJW Sexperience [f86a54] (完整) • RJW Sexperience Ideology [0294af] (完整)
• Cumpilation [b6439b] (完整) • RJW Menstruation Cycle [ac1a64] (完整) • RJW Menstruation - Resources [4c915b] (完整) • RimJobWorld - Licentia Labs Stretching Edition [488fed] (完整)
• RJW Genes [b0da74] (完整) • Fantasy Races [f29fca] (完整)
• Ultimate Animation Pack [214203] (完整) • ElToros Bestiality Animations [1fa0fc] (完整)
• Sized Apparel for Slaves [01a47f] (完整) • RimJobWorld - Extension [ff57f5] (完整)
• Privacy, Please! [518778] (完整) • RimJobWorld - Brothel Colony [897797] (完整) • RimJobWorld - Milkable Colonists [4f7061] (完整) • RJW-Events [1f3832] (完整) • ElToros Bestiality Addon [60fffb] (完整)
已棄用的附加模組，不再提供更新與修正 • RimJobWorld - Interaction Addon [13b209] (完整) • C0ffeeRIA [f13a1f] (完整) • RimJobWorld - Licentia Labs [938d07] (完整)
